Off Calendar Jan-04-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Liza Murawski, 566-1550, moving party appearing in propria persona

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted it's tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT LIZA MURAWSKI's Application For Order To Seal Record is denied per CCP 1161.2 (a)(5) as defendant is not prevailing party as case settled. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
